title: OpenCode Changelog: v1.17.9 with MCP Fixes and GLM-5.2 Support
description: Latest OpenCode updates include MCP OAuth fixes, Devstral model detection, new high/max thinking variants for GLM-5.2, improved timeout handling for long-running MCP tools, and step limit enforcement to prevent mid-run failures.

title: AI News Today - June 21, 2026: 16 Biggest Stories
description: Comprehensive roundup covering Fable 5 ban developments (Day 9), Anthropic's Seoul office opening with major Korean enterprise adoption (NAVER, Samsung SDS, LG CNS), and the White House's zero-jailbreak precondition for model restoration.

title: AI News Today - June 20, 2026: 16 Biggest Stories
description: Top stories include Noam Shazeer's departure from Google to OpenAI as Lead Architecture Researcher, Fable 5 refund deadline passing, China's $295B five-year AI infrastructure plan, and FERC's historic grid interconnection orders for AI data centers.

title: Awesome Harness Engineering: Tools, Patterns, and Evals for AI Agents
description: Curated list for AI agent harness engineering covering tools, patterns, evaluations, memory, MCP, permissions, observability, and orchestration. Updated June 20, 2026 with new Life-Harness additions to the Agent Loop section.

title: LedgerAgent: Structured State for Policy-Adherent Tool-Calling Agents
description: New inference-time method for tool-calling agents that maintains observed task states in a separate ledger, rendering them into prompts and validating state-dependent policy constraints before execution. Improves average pass^k across customer-service domains.

title: Multi-LCB: Extending LiveCodeBench to Multiple Programming Languages
description: New benchmark evaluating 24 LLMs across 12 programming languages (extending LiveCodeBench beyond Python). Reveals Python overfitting, language-specific contamination, and substantial multilingual performance disparities in current models.

title: Automating SKILL.md Generation for Computer-Using Agents via Interaction Trajectory Mining
description: 3-stage pipeline to automatically generate SKILL.md documentation for computer-using agents by segmenting GUI trajectories, clustering into candidate skills, and training skill-aware policies. Diagnostic study revealing current limitations in cross-domain transfer.

title: The Router Era: Why Not Owning a Frontier Model Became an Advantage
description: Analysis of how model routing has become a competitive moat in mid-2026, with no single model dominating all tasks. Covers OpenRouter, Factory Router, and how companies like Cursor, OpenCode, and Cognition Devin treat model-agnosticism as a feature.
